name: x402-notary-mcp
description: Cryptographic receipts for AI outputs on Base or Solana via x402.

NOTARY_RAIL.description: Payment rail. Use base or solana.

NOTARY_BASE_URL.description: Notary API origin. Base: https://notary.forgemesh.io. Solana: https://notary-solana.forgemesh.io.

WALLET_PRIVATE_KEY.description: Optional dedicated low-balance Base wallet private key for paid x402 notarization. Free verification tools work without it.

SOLANA_PRIVATE_KEY.description: Optional dedicated low-balance Solana keypair for paid x402 notarization. Supports JSON byte array, base58, base64, or hex.

BASE_RPC_URL.description: Optional Base mainnet RPC URL used for Base payment timestamp safety.
